task.input: Given the CinemaAI PRD (v0.3/v0.4) describing an AI-driven anime/short-drama production tool (15 modules, 86+ functions, ~268 PD), and any sibling artifacts already produced upstream, produce a N120 api-intent-extraction artifact. The ground truth is at: API意图清单.csv (full path embedded in expected.ground_truth_path).
known_traps: missing key items the real artifact captured

blocker_mapping,B-N120-02
readiness,ready
contract_status,review_ready
confidence_summary,"{\"confirmed\":[],\"inferred\":[],\"pending\":[]}"

eventbus_subscribers,[N330]
route_back_to,none
rule_results,"[{\"rule_id\":\"R01_one_business_verb_per_intent\",\"severity\":\"reject\",\"result\":\"pass\"},{\"rule_id\":\"R02_exception_apis_checked\",\"severity\":\"warn\",\"result\":\"pass\"},{\"rule_id\":\"R03_nfr_hints_populated\",\"severity\":\"warn\",\"result\":\"pass\"},{\"rule_id\":\"R04_derived_from_er_ids_when_upstream_exists\",\"severity\":\"warn\",\"result\":\"pass\"},{\"rule_id\":\"R05_no_openapi_draft_by_default\",\"severity\":\"reject\",\"result\":\"pass\"},{\"rule_id\":\"R06_resource_family_coherent\",\"severity\":\"warn\",\"result\":\"pass\"},{\"rule_id\":\"R07_nfr_hints_present_for_write_apis\",\"severity\":\"warn\",\"result\":\"pass\"},{\"rule_id\":\"R08_confidence_not_silent\",\"severity\":\"reject\",\"result\":\"pass\"}]"
feedback_signal_to_n005,"{\"signal_type\":\"none\",\"summary\":\"\",\"target_n070_skills\":[\"013-requirement-breakdown\",\"015-state-transition-mapping\"]}"

API-001,script.generate,脚本生成,[ER-001],script_lifecycle,rest,script,generate,根据用户输入的题材、风格、角色设定等参数，生成符合要求的分镜脚本,用户点击“生成脚本”按钮,[],[\"cancel\", \"retry\", \"status-query\", \"dry-run\"],[\"latency: <3s p95\", \"availability: 99.95%\"],{\"path\":\"/v1/scripts\", \"method\":\"POST\"},[user,ai-engine],[\"valid prompt provided\", \"user quota available\"],[\"idempotent\", \"audit-logged\"],\"201 Created\" with script_id and preview_url,[\"audit log written\", \"usage counter incremented\", \"event_published: script.generated\"],[],explicit
API-002,script.validate,脚本校验,[ER-002],script_lifecycle,rest,script,validate,对已生成或上传的脚本进行合规性、逻辑连贯性、版权风险等多维校验,用户点击“校验脚本”或自动触发于上传后,[],[\"re-validate\", \"export-report\"],[\"accuracy: >92% on known violation patterns\", \"throughput: 50 scripts/min\"],{\"path\":\"/v1/scripts/{id}/validate\", \"method\":\"POST\"},[user,ai-engine,compliance-service],[\"script exists and is editable\"],[\"rate-limited per user\"],\"200 OK\" with validation_report,[\"compliance event published\", \"risk score stored\"],[],explicit
API-003,script.export,脚本导出,[ER-003],script_lifecycle,batch_rpc,script,export,将校验通过的脚本导出为多种格式（PDF、Final Draft、Aegisub）供下游制作使用,用户点击“导出”并选择格式,[],[\"cancel-job\", \"retry-job\", \"job-status-query\", \"partial-result-download\"],[\"max_file_size: 50MB\", \"timeout: 120s\"],{\"rpc_name\":\"ExportScript\", \"input_schema\":\"ExportRequest\"},[user,export-service],[\"script status = validated\"],[\"format must be supported\"],\"202 Accepted\" with job_id,[\"export job enqueued\", \"event_published: script.export_requested\"],[],explicit
API-004,scene.split,分镜拆解,[ER-004],scene_lifecycle,rest,scene,split,将长脚本按镜头逻辑、节奏、情绪节点自动拆分为独立分镜单元,用户在编辑器中触发“智能拆分”,[],[\"undo-split\", \"bulk-split\"],[\"precision: >88% alignment with manual splits\"],{\"path\":\"/v1/scenes/split\", \"method\":\"POST\"},[user,ai-engine],[\"script_id provided\", \"min_duration > 0.5s\"],[\"idempotent\"],\"201 Created\" with scene_ids,[\"scene_created events published\", \"scene metadata indexed\"],[],explicit
API-005,scene.enhance,分镜增强,[ER-005],scene_lifecycle,grpc,scene,enhance,为分镜添加AI生成的视觉描述、运镜建议、BGM提示、声效标签等增强元数据,用户在分镜详情页点击“增强”,[],[\"regenerate-enhancement\", \"rollback-enhancement\"],[\"p99 latency < 800ms\", \"concurrency: 200 req/sec\"],{\"service\":\"scene-enhancer\", \"method\":\"EnhanceScene\"},[user,ai-engine],[\"scene_id valid\", \"enhancement profile selected\"],[\"quota-checked\"],\"EnhanceSceneResponse\" with enriched fields,[\"enhancement audit logged\", \"event_published: scene.enhanced\"],[],explicit
API-006,asset.search,素材检索,[ER-006],asset_lifecycle,graphql,asset,search,支持多模态（文本+参考图+情绪标签）联合检索匹配的动画素材、音效、BGM、贴纸等,用户在素材库输入搜索条件,[],[\"search-history-query\", \"saved-search-query\"],[\"recall@10 > 0.75\", \"response_time < 1.2s\"],{\"operation_type\":\"query\", \"operation_name\":\"searchAssets\"},[user,search-service],[\"at least one search criterion provided\"],[\"NSFW filter enabled by default\"],GraphQL response with asset edges and pagination,[\"search telemetry logged\", \"trending query updated\"],[],explicit
API-007,asset.bind,素材绑定,[ER-007],asset_lifecycle,rest,asset,bind,将检索到的素材与指定分镜建立强关联，并同步更新渲染指令和版本引用,用户拖拽素材至分镜轨道,[],[\"unbind\", \"replace-asset\"],[\"consistency: eventual consistency across render queue\"],{\"path\":\"/v1/scenes/{scene_id}/assets\", \"method\":\"PUT\"},[user,render-coordinator],[\"scene_id and asset_id exist\", \"binding not locked\"],[\"versioned reference\", \"conflict-detection\"],\"200 OK\" with binding_id,[\"render instruction updated\", \"event_published: asset.bound\"],[],explicit
API-008,render.submit,渲染提交,[ER-008],render_lifecycle,batch_rpc,render_job,submit,提交分镜序列及绑定素材至渲染集群，启动分布式渲染流程,用户点击“开始渲染”,[],[\"cancel-job\", \"retry-job\", \"job-status-query\", \"DLQ-requeue\"],[\"max_concurrent_jobs: 15\", \"timeout: 3600s\"],{\"rpc_name\":\"SubmitRenderJob\", \"input_schema\":\"RenderJobRequest\"},[user,render-service],[\"all scenes bound and validated\", \"quota sufficient\"],[\"priority field honored\"],\"202 Accepted\" with job_id,[\"job enqueued in priority queue\", \"event_published: render.submitted\"],[],explicit
API-009,render.status,渲染状态查询,[ER-009],render_lifecycle,rest,render_job,status,实时查询单个渲染任务的状态、进度、日志片段、estimated completion,系统轮询或用户手动刷新,[],[],[\"availability: 99.99%\", \"p95 latency < 200ms\"],{\"path\":\"/v1/render/jobs/{job_id}\", \"method\":\"GET\"},[user,monitoring-service],[\"job_id valid\"],[\"authz: job owner or admin\"],\"200 OK\" with status object,[\"metrics emitted to Prometheus\"],[],explicit
API-010,render.download,渲染结果下载,[ER-010],render_lifecycle,webhook,render_job,download,向用户终端推送已完成渲染视频的直链（含时效签名），支持断点续传和CDN加速,渲染完成且用户在线,[],[\"callback-failure-compensation\", \"callback-replay\"],[\"link_ttl: 24h\", \"cdn_cache_hit_rate > 95%\"],{\"webhook_event\":\"render.completed\", \"delivery_method\":\"https_post\"},[render-service,user],[\"job status = completed\"],[\"signature verified\"],HTTP POST to user-configured endpoint with download_url,[\"delivery attempt logged\", \"failure alert triggered if 3 retries fail\"],[],explicit
API-011,project.import,项目导入,[ER-011],project_lifecycle,batch_rpc,project,import,批量导入外部项目（如Final Draft XML、Aegisub ASS、JSON schema）并重建本地资源关系图,用户上传 ZIP 或 URL,[],[\"validate-only\", \"resume-partial\", \"import-status\"],[\"max_import_size: 200MB\", \"timeout: 600s\"],{\"rpc_name\":\"ImportProject\", \"input_schema\":\"ImportRequest\"},[user,import-service],[\"file format supported\", \"schema version compatible\"],[\"sandboxed parsing\"],\"202 Accepted\" with import_id,[\"import job enqueued\", \"event_published: project.import_started\"],[],explicit
API-012,project.export,项目导出,[ER-012],project_lifecycle,batch_rpc,project,export,导出完整项目包（含脚本、分镜、绑定关系、元数据）为可移植归档格式,用户点击“导出项目”,[],[\"cancel-job\", \"retry-job\", \"job-status-query\"],[\"archive_integrity: SHA256 signed\", \"size_limit: 500MB\"],{\"rpc_name\":\"ExportProject\", \"input_schema\":\"ExportRequest\"},[user,export-service],[\"project has at least one validated script\"],[\"export format selected\"],\"202 Accepted\" with job_id,[\"archive generated and signed\", \"event_published: project.export_requested\"],[],explicit
API-013,feedback.submit,反馈提交,[ER-013],feedback_lifecycle,event_driven,feedback,submit,采集用户对AI输出（脚本/分镜/渲染）的显式反馈（赞/踩/修正/评论），用于模型迭代,用户点击“反馈”按钮,[],[\"feedback-history-query\", \"anonymize-on-export\"],[\"privacy: PII redacted before ML ingestion\"],{\"event_name\":\"user.feedback.submitted\", \"topic\":\"cinemaai.feedback\"},[user,feedback-collector],[\"feedback target identified\", \"rating or comment provided\"],[\"GDPR-compliant storage\"],Event published to Kafka topic,[\"feedback stored in feedback-store\", \"ML retraining pipeline triggered if threshold met\"],[],explicit
API-014,feedback.analyze,反馈分析,[ER-014],feedback_lifecycle,rest,feedback,analyze,聚合分析历史反馈数据，生成质量热力图、常见失败模式、模型偏差报告,定时任务或管理员触发,[],[\"export-analysis-report\", \"drill-down-by-tag\"],[\"data freshness: <5m lag\", \"report generation SLA: 30s\"],{\"path\":\"/v1/feedback/analyze\", \"method\":\"GET\"},[admin,analytics-service],[\"time_range specified\"],[\"RBAC: admin only\"],\"200 OK\" with analysis JSON,[\"analytics dashboard updated\"],[],explicit
API-015,quota.check,配额校验,[ER-015],system_lifecycle,rest,quota,check,实时校验用户当前剩余配额（脚本生成次数、渲染时长、存储空间），防止超额使用,前置拦截于所有 write APIs,[],[\"quota-history-query\", \"top-up-trigger\"],[\"p95 latency < 50ms\", \"high availability required\"],{\"path\":\"/v1/quota/check\", \"method\":\"POST\"},[user,quota-service],[\"resource_type and amount specified\"],[\"idempotent\", \"cached for 10s\"],\"200 OK\" with remaining_quota,[\"quota usage logged\", \"alert sent if below threshold\"],[],explicit
API-016,auth.webhook.verify,Webhook签名验证,[ER-016],security_lifecycle,rest,webhook,verify,提供标准端点供第三方消费者验证 CinemaAI 发出的 webhook 请求签名（HMAC-SHA256），确保来源可信,第三方服务调用此端点,[],[\"signature-verify endpoint\"],[\"security: signature verification mandatory\"],{\"path\":\"/v1/webhook/verify\", \"method\":\"POST\"},[third-party-consumer,auth-service],[\"X-Hub-Signature-256 header present\", \"payload matches signature\"],[\"rate-limited\"],\"200 OK\" if valid, else \"401 Unauthorized\",[],[],explicit
